name: Kermode Resources Ltd.
summary: Kermode Resources Ltd. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of natural resource properties in Canada. It holds 15% interests in Eastgate Gold property located northeast of the Rawhide Mine, and east of Fallon in Churchill, County, Nevada. The company also entered into an option agreement to acquire a 100% interest in the Vidette Lake gold project in British Columbia. Kermode Resources Ltd. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
